ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" INTEGER /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent FOREIGN KEY ("continent") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dataset belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was collected */,
  "lifeExp" REAL /* Life expectancy in the country */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdpPercap" REAL /* GDP per capita in the country */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability score of the dataset */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "major_languages" TEXT /* Major languages spoken in the continent */,
  "major_religions" TEXT /* Major religions practiced in the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
